home.title: SS Kidney Care — Advanced nephrology in Sambalpur
home.description: Specialist kidney care in Sambalpur, Odisha. Dialysis, CKD management, AKI treatment, preventive screening and advanced therapies — all in one place.

about.title: About — SS Kidney Care
about.description: Founded in 2023, SS Kidney Care brings advanced nephrology to western Odisha. Our story, the team, and the standards we hold ourselves to.

index.title: Treatments — SS Kidney Care
index.description: Hemodialysis, peritoneal dialysis, CKD management, AKI treatment, hypertension and diabetes-related kidney care, preventive screening and plasmapheresis.

index.title: Our consultants — SS Kidney Care
index.description: Meet our consultant nephrologists. Areas of focus, languages spoken, days available.

facilities.title: Facilities — SS Kidney Care
facilities.description: Six-machine dialysis floor, renal ICU, in-house biochemistry lab, and a 24×7 ambulance service in Sambalpur.
